content:
ISO 34271 jẹ boṣewa fun idagbasoke itesiwaju sọfitiwia, pẹlu ifojusi lori iṣakoso didara ati iṣiro awọn itọka iṣẹ. Fun iṣiro itọka iṣọkan itusilẹ (Release Consistency Index, RCI) ni gbogbo ẹnu-ọna ipele pipeline, o nilo irinṣẹ ti o le ṣe atẹle ati ṣe itupalẹ awọn ipele oriṣiriṣi ti ilana idagbasoke laifọwọyi.

Irinṣẹ ti o ṣe atilẹyin iṣiro RCI laifọwọyi ni gbogbogbo jẹ awọn irinṣẹ iṣakoso didara sọfitiwia ati awọn irinṣẹ CI/CD (Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment) ti o ni agbara lati ṣe atẹle awọn metiriki iṣẹ ati awọn itọka didara.

Diẹ ninu awọn irinṣẹ ti o le ṣe atilẹyin iṣiro RCI laifọwọyi ni:

1. **Son
